MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Micah Jacobs for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant's Counsel Micah Jacobs is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. Due to the proximity of the Trial Date the OSC is not re-set at this time. Proceedings reported by: JoAnn Prior, CSR# 9129. (212)

Plaintiff Stephanie Mason'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Defendant West Coast Retina Medical Group (To Be Heard In Discovery Dept. 610, Set In 302 In Error)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Stephanie Mason's motion to compel production of documents and further responses to form interrogatories is granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce the specified documents once the parties have met and conferred and executed a stipulated protective order. Defendant may also redact the last name and the social security number of any persons identified in the records. Defendant is also ordered to respond to subpart (c) of form interrogatory 15.1 within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Deft West Coast Retina Medical Group, Inc.
